commands.summary: Confirmed RepoPact validation passed after adding the emulator smoke-test host-blocker records and required ROM lab files.
Ran the ROM lab profile and safety tests successfully.
Read-only host capture recorded Java, SDK, emulator, ADB, AVD, Windows, GPU/driver, and recent emulator log/index metadata without copying large crash databases or AVD images.

commands.command: Documentation-only review of prior emulator launch attempts from handoff.txt
commands.summary: Recorded that SDK install and AVD creation succeeded, while emulator boot was blocked by a Windows graphics/Vulkan/OpenGL backend crash. No additional random emulator launches were attempted.
